D:\\user\\xxh\\ÑĐ¾¿orÏîÄ¿\\LSTM\\LSTM»ă×Ü\\´úÂë\\ÊµÑématlab\\experiment\\experiment_5.csv
TransformerModel(
  (linear1): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=4, bias=False)
  (embed): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=36, bias=True)
  (pos_encoder): PositionalEncoding()
  (transformer_encoder): TransformerEncoder(
    (layers): ModuleList(
      (0-5): 6 x TransformerEncoderLayer(
        (self_attn): MultiheadAttention(
          (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=36, out_features=36, bias=True)
        )
        (linear1): Linear(in_features=36, out_features=1024, bias=True)
        (dropout): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
        (linear2): Linear(in_features=1024, out_features=36, bias=True)
        (norm1): LayerNorm((36,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
        (norm2): LayerNorm((36,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
        (dropout1): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
        (dropout2): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
      )
    )
  )
  (decoder): Linear(in_features=36, out_features=12, bias=True)
  (linear2): Linear(in_features=12, out_features=4, bias=False)
)
Epoch 1/1000, Loss: 1.0619213896617294
Epoch 2/1000, Loss: 0.7332287867181003
Epoch 3/1000, Loss: 0.7019265451934189
Epoch 4/1000, Loss: 0.7050848015677184
D:\\user\\xxh\\ÑĐ¾¿orÏîÄ¿\\LSTM\\LSTM»ă×Ü\\´úÂë\\ÊµÑématlab\\experiment\\experiment_5.csv
TransformerModel(
  (linear1): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=4, bias=False)
  (embed): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=36, bias=True)
  (pos_encoder): PositionalEncoding()
  (transformer_encoder): TransformerEncoder(
    (layers): ModuleList(
      (0-5): 6 x TransformerEncoderLayer(
        (self_attn): MultiheadAttention(
          (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=36, out_features=36, bias=True)
        )
        (linear1): Linear(in_features=36, out_features=1024, bias=True)
        (dropout): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
        (linear2): Linear(in_features=1024, out_features=36, bias=True)
        (norm1): LayerNorm((36,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
        (norm2): LayerNorm((36,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
        (dropout1): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
        (dropout2): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
      )
    )
  )
  (decoder): Linear(in_features=36, out_features=12, bias=True)
  (linear2): Linear(in_features=12, out_features=4, bias=False)
)

D:\\user\\xxh\\ÑĐ¾¿orÏîÄ¿\\LSTM\\LSTM»ă×Ü\\´úÂë\\ÊµÑématlab\\experiment\\experiment_5.csv
TransformerModel(
  (linear1): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=4, bias=False)
  (embed): Linear(in_features=4, out_features=32, bias=True)
  (pos_encoder): PositionalEncoding()
  (transformer_encoder): TransformerEncoder(
    (layers): ModuleList(
      (0-2): 3 x TransformerEncoderLayer(
        (self_attn): MultiheadAttention(
          (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=32, out_features=32, bias=True)
        )
        (linear1): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=2048, bias=True)
        (dropout): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
        (linear2): Linear(in_features=2048, out_features=32, bias=True)
        (norm1): LayerNorm((32,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
        (norm2): LayerNorm((32,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
        (dropout1): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
        (dropout2): Dropout(p=0.1, inplace=False)
      )
    )
  )
  (decoder): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=12, bias=True)
  (linear2): Linear(in_features=12, out_features=4, bias=False)
)
Epoch 1/1000, Loss: 0.8140317369438708
